title: galium trilobum
intro: Galium trilobum, also known as the three-lobed bedstraw, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been attributed to its alkaloid and flavonoid content. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe digestive issues, making it a valuable remedy in traditional folk medicine. Galium trilobum is often prepared as a tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, and its leaves and stems can also be dried and used in herbal infusions or as a culinary ingredient.
